Drug Stores & Pharmacies.

“Midway Importing is the leading Hispanic health and beauty care distributor in the United States because we are dedicated towards providing the best mix of Hispanic brands, at the right price. We have achieved unmatched success for the past 25 years by complementing our brands with excellent merchandising services, and a comprehensive marketing program. Here at Midway we are truly a family, committed to improving the lives of the US Hispanic consumer.”
